rationale.Banking: High-liquidity large-cap banks representing India's financial backbone. HDFC Bank & ICICI for private sector; SBI for PSU exposure.
rationale.IT: TCS and Infosys — top IT exporters. IT sector shows strong seasonal patterns tied to global tech demand and USD/INR dynamics.
rationale.Pharma: Sun Pharma and Dr. Reddy's — defensive sector with low correlation to cyclicals. Interesting volatility profiles during health events.
rationale.FMCG: ITC and Hindustan Unilever — stable, low-volatility stocks for portfolio risk reduction. Strong trend components.
rationale.Auto: Tata Motors and Maruti — cyclical sector with high momentum potential. EV transition creates interesting regime shifts.
